/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -pedantic -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.5.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=26.3 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/calculator.dir/src/calculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/calculator.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o bin/calculator
